programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: 'S3/E23 - Stick It'. Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket's nephew and Bruiser Jnr swapping football stickers and decides that he wants to fill up a sticker album too.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: 'S3/E24 - Bean at the Museum'. Mr. Bean thinks he's just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden and goes rushing off to the Museum to have it valued.

programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Don't Tell Dad'. Marina doesn't dare show her father her magic slides.

programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Baby Bump'. Cody's mama has a baby bump! He makes sure to sing songs and have fun with her and the baby!

programme.title: Cocomelon - It's Cody Time

programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - The Challenge'. Russell challenges Jeff and Adam to a contest to see which one of them - single, engaged or married - has it easier when it comes to 'sealing the deal' with women.

programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Family Style'. While on a double date with Brad and his partner, Jackie, Jeff gets annoyed when Jackie helps himself to his meal.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Welcome To The Scooter'. When the Johnsons' Christmas present for Grover is stolen, Calvin and Dave team up to recover the gift in time for the holiday.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Welcome To The Freeloader'. Dave's patience is tested when Gemma's freeloading sister, Brittany, suddenly shows up with plans for an extended stay.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Dire Strayts'. Doug and Ray want to get together on a Saturday night to watch sports, but like all good husbands everywhere, they realise that the plan won't work with the wives.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Head First'. When the hot, new waitress at the local hangout flirts with Doug, he is giddy with excitement. But, Carrie wonders what's up when Doug suddenly starts wearing cologne and nice pants.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Rock'. Carrie's best friend has a very annoying husband and when Doug finds out that Carrie has invited the couple to spend the long Thanksgiving weekend with them, he must stop her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - One Wrong Move'. John tries a new restaurant after being accused of being a creature of habit.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - What Indifference A Day Makes'. Becker mentors a student. Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - The Usual Suspects'. John Becker's office is vandalised and a detective is on scene to investigate. During the investigation, Becker realises he's got more enemies than he thought.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Audrey is Dumb'. After getting invited to a much cooler party, Jeff and Audrey lie to Jennifer and Adam to get out of a dinner they are hosting.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Nature Calls'. When Timmy grows tired of dealing with Russell's demeaning demands and Audrey has had it with her terrible assistant, the two find a possible solution in working together.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Welcome To The Vow Renewal'. As Calvin and Tina near a milestone anniversary, Dave and Gemma decide to help the Butlers have the wedding they missed out on the first time around.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Welcome To Bowling'. With Calvin down a teammate for his annual bowling championship, Dave offers to fill in and soon finds his mediation skills put to the test when he meets the competition.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Fixer Upper'. Carrie decides to have a surprise party to celebrate Arthur's 75th birthday.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Best Man'. When Deacon talks Doug into the play day in Atlantic City, Doug lies to Carrie about where he is really going so he can avoid her protestations.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Big Dougie'. Feeling the need to volunteer his time to a charity, Doug becomes a big brother and attempts a 10K run.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Cripple Fight'. Big Gay Al returns to South Park only to be thrown out as Scoutmaster for being gay.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Terrance & Phillip: Behind The Blow'. Flatulent superstars Terrance and Phillip break up over creative differences and the boys must work against the clock to reunite their favourite duo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Cartmanland'. Cartman inherits a large sum of money from his grandmother and uses it to buy an amusement park. He doesn't allow anyone else into the park, because he doesn't want to wait in line for the rides.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Proper Condom Use'. The children of South Park must endure sex education lessons from an unlikely duo and the children are left frightened and armed for battle against the opposite sex.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Towelie'. Stan's mom buys the boys a new video game system and they are looking forward to playing it all weekend.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: 'S29/E135'. An American late-night talk and satirical news television program.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid XL
programme.desc: 'S9/E3 - Ticking And Screaming'. Sam gets a tick bite in the worst spot imaginable. When Terra encourages Lynsey to quit, emotions erupt. The Badlands send a survivalist home.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Search And Rescue'. Hunter runs pay dirt from a promising new location called the Plateau. Todd calls the Alaska Troopers when Framer goes missing on a solo caribou hunt.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Jack Knows Best'. When the Black Pearl's trommel motor catches fire, Todd's crew attempts to modify the smaller wash plant Jack built decades ago to run more pay dirt.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E6 - Crash Testing, Delftware, Umbrellas'. How do they blend science and destruction at crash test centres? And how do they piece together the complex mechanism of a pocket sized umbrella?

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - 100 Episodes Strong!'. ATM is excited to design a tank for WWE superstar Titus O'Neil. The guys will need to work as a team to deliver a Gator tank with a University of Florida theme.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Prince Fielder's Big Hit'. The Texas Ranger's biggest slugger, Prince Fielder, is building his man cave in his home in Orlando, Florida, complete with an elegant saltwater aquarium.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Rustic English Re-Tree-T'. Pete embarks on a quest to an idyllic farm with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S13/E8'. Seeing an untapped source of rare items, Drew tours Catalonia looking for some chic Spanish antiques. In Peralada, Drew is blown away by a 17th Century house full of treasures.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E3 - Mardi Gras'. A look at how the amazing, and massive, decorations on Mardi Gras carnival floats are created, how rock candy is twisted together, and a look at how dentures are made.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E4 - Helmets, Tea, District Heating'. How do they harvest and treat the world's most expensive tea? Plus, how does the Siekierki power plant of Warsaw, Poland heat half the city's homes?

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Whatever Floats Your Goat'. Redbeard takes on a diesel build of his own. Will his Hail Mary cost them a Queen's Ransom? Meanwhile, it's time to see if the Gama Goat will sink or swim.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Diesel Doze It'. Heavy D pushes his luck on a vintage 1951 International Diesel dozer with engine problems. Plus, Redbeard announces their first-ever double giveaway.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S13/E9'. Drew road trips to Cornwall to for a major buying mission. In Penzance he haggles with a hoarder who owns a reclamation yard, before heading to the county's busiest auction house.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E7 - Iron Ore, Wave Flume, Chandeliers'. How do they extract iron ore from one of the most remote mines on the planet? And how do they make chandeliers that are fit for a queen?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E8 - Oyster Knives, Stadium Lights, Diamonds'. How do they forge the blades to crack open oyster shells? Plus, how do scientists in a lab grow the synthetic diamonds of the future?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E9 - Cheddar Cheese, CPR Mannequins'. How do they make cheddar, the world's most popular cheese? How do they breathe life into Rususci Anne - the plastic woman that teaches CPR?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S14/E10 - Ford Transits, Driza-bone, Saltfish'. How do Ford produce the ubiquitous white van, the Transit? Plus, how do they ensure the Driza-bone coat lives up to its name?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: 'S18/E16 - No Turning Back'. A dangerous list forces Sig to jettison pots or capsize the Northwestern. One wrong move in the narrow False Pass causes Jake and the Saga to hit bottom.

programme.desc: 'S18/E17 - Operation Anvil Drop'. Keith recruits Johnathan to intercept a Russian trawler fishing illegally. But the situation intensifies when a missile streaks across their position.

programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Fired Up And Throwing Down'. The Misfits prepare for their next project - a rare 2WD 1978 Blazer. But after one of their long-time partners decides to quit, have they hit a roadblock?

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Treehouse Z'. Pete connects with old friends to build them a Zen-like sanctuary in the trees. The team stays calm in constructing a retreat with a view of the Blue Ridge Mountains.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.desc: 'S14/E9 - Cheddar Cheese, CPR Mannequins'. How do they make cheddar, the world's most popular cheese? How do they breathe life into Rususci Anne - the plastic woman that teaches CPR?

programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - The Gold And The Glory'. Todd's crew races to beat 1,000 ounces and make a profitable final season for Grampa Jack. They are hampered by a heavy snowfall in the forecast.

programme.title: Tanked

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way'. Backstreet Boy Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the desert.

programme.desc: 'S18/E18 - Hell On The High Seas'. Josh and Casey approach the ice edge while braving an Aleutian storm. Jake's niece and engineer climb the 30ft crane to make a critical repair.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: 'S18/E19 - Avian Apocalypse'. The Cornelia Marie crashes into the ice pack when the greenhorn on watch falls asleep at the wheel. Plus, hundreds of seabirds bombard the Saga.

programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Cloudy With A Chance Of Explosives'. Slim Pickings' efforts to recycle precious dam water are derailed. The Blacklighters scrounge for any last opal in their Land of Promise Claim.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Fiery Attacks'. Terror ensues when a man with a lighter douses a gas station in gasoline. Plus, when armed robbers hold up a store, a brave employee fights back.

programme.desc: 'S9/E4 - A Parasite To Behold'. A newly formed tribe stalks and kills a caiman. Plus, a survivalist is on the brink when medics discover parasites in their digestive system.

programme.desc: 'S3/E9 of 13'. Wat is die kortste maand van die jaar? Dink die klitse hulle sal 'n goeie sportkaptein maak? Hierdie is maar net 'n paar van die vrae wat ons hierdie week vir die klas vra.

programme.title: Hartklop
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 13'. Louw en Karima trou en hy pas nie goed aan by die getroude lewe nie. Fezile doen 'n borsinplanting op 'n trans-vrou. Jolene se verlede haal haar in toe sy haar stiefpa se lewe moet red.

programme.title: Sê Jou Sê
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 of 12'. Ons gesels met mense aan wie beloftes gemaak is van werk, hulle vorige werke bedank het en toe is daar niks.

programme.title: My Naam Is Farah

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E180 of 239'. Kaashifa het 'n moeilike besluit om te neem aangaande Emir. Elana se kroeg kry swaar onder die protesaksie en Riaan se verlede haal hom in.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E93 of 140'. Ronnie wil dinge tussen hom en Hazel regmaak. JP gaan voort om Willem se boerderystyl te kritiseer. Ragel spoor eindelik vir Louis op. Amber vertel JP van Ronnie en Christine se verneukery.

programme.title: Klaskamer 10
programme.desc: 'S8/E102 of 105'. In wiskunde behandel Martin graad 10 wiskunde konsepte. Werner kyk, tydens die FW deel van die les, na die fisiese wetenskappe konsepte wat in graad 10 bemeester moet word.

programme.title: Super Rugby
programme.desc: 'S11/E47 of 47'. Kenners kyk na die jongste ontwikkelinge in die rugby-wêreld. Ateljeegaste neem ook deel aan besprekings en beantwoord kykers se inbelvrae.

programme.title: Lui Maar Op Belinda

programme.title: My Heart Knows
programme.desc: 'S5/E44'. Kalyani shares a special bond with her stepmother Anupriya who supports her through every trial and tribulation. Their bond becomes stronger when Malhar forcibly enters Kalyani's life and marries her.

programme.title: Amulya's Wedding
programme.desc: 'S1/E87 - 1/87'. Vedanth and Amulya, two individuals with contrasting personalities, constantly argue with each other. However, they soon fall for each other and try to make their relationship work.

programme.title: This Is Fate
programme.desc: 'S7/E69 - 7/69'. Preeta's serene life turns chaotic when Karan marries her under unconventional circumstances. However, as a dutiful wife, she vows to nurture and protect her new family from those out to destroy them.

programme.title: Betrayal
programme.desc: 'S1/E62 - 1/62'. Neel goes to the hall secretly to listen to Megh's singing. Grandma also attends the function and is so pleased with Megh's singing that she gifts Megh her own necklace.

programme.title: Hearts Crossed
programme.desc: 'S1/E150 - 1/150'. Gouri, a staunch devotee of Goddess Kali, meets Ishan, an atheist doctor. As a result, Gouri strives to change Ishan's views on faith and miracles.

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: 'S1/E190 - 1/190'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: 'S1/E190 - 1/190'. Dua is happily married to her husband until he makes a request to her. Her seemingly perfect life goes for a toss when he seeks her permission to marry another woman.

programme.title: Ringside Rebel
programme.desc: 'S1/E69 - 1/69'. Despite the pressure of societal expectations and prejudices, a young woman from a small-town aims to make it big as a professional boxer.

programme.title: Love Unbound
programme.desc: 'S1/E61 - 1/61'. Kind-hearted Heer faces difficulties when her rich family marries her into the Atwal family, but she finds the confidence to overcome all obstacles.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: 'S1/E327 - 1/327'. Special crime branch officer Jagaddhatri attempts to balance her personal and work life, but keeping her real identity a secret whilst running an NGO and solving cases leads to problems.

programme.desc: 'S1/E150 - 1/150'. Amruta is a romantic who believes in the bond of love and marriage, while Virat bears the scars of a broken relationship. When the duo cross paths, they find themselves clashing due to their contrasting views.

programme.desc: 'S2/E11'. Briana's mom Roxanne returns home. Ali refuses to use her wheelchair. Cheyenne takes the kids to visit Taylor. Jade's mom Christy lands herself back in jail.

programme.title: The Challenge: Battle Of The Eras
programme.desc: 'S40/E11 - A New Era'. The game takes a huge turn as the Challengers must now work as individuals to claim victory. A hot and grueling challenge has one person seeing double.

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: A young man is cursed after stealing money from the revered and feared local inyanga. He knows he has to take it back, but the problem is he doesn't know how.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Best friends dream of becoming music superstars. Luck seems to finally be on their side when they find a room full of musical instruments at the local community centre.

programme.title: Tango
programme.desc: A talented dancer dreams of making it big, but his new dancing partner has other ideas.

programme.title: Ukholo
programme.desc: After being dumped by his wife on their anniversary, a decent man becomes depressed, until a kind voice nurses his faith back to life.

programme.title: Uthando Lwababili
programme.desc: A young man is caught between his family and his opinionated girlfriend. Is he going to choose the woman of his dreams or stick to what his family wants for him?

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: A young man is cursed after stealing money from the revered and feared local inyanga. He knows he has to take it back, but the problem is he doesn't know how.

programme.title: Mmangwana
programme.desc: Inspired by the Sesotho idiom, 'Mmangwana o tshwara thipa ka bohaleng', this emotional drama is about women and the sacrifices they make for those they love.

programme.title: Mapetla
programme.desc: Three girls find themselves faced with the hardship of township life. It seems their only way out of this life is through promiscuity.

programme.title: Senatla
programme.desc: A bodybuilding promoter uses all her savings to take a local bodybuilder to Johannesburg with hopes of turning him into a big star.

programme.title: Nkosathana
programme.desc: A nerdy student finds out his girlfriend has been crowned queen of a rural clan. To keep her, he has to go through the gruelling process of becoming a warrior clansman.

programme.title: Icala Lika Thembi
programme.desc: A young mother suffering from postpartum depression is jailed and goes to trial for killing her baby. Did she or did she not commit the crime?

programme.title: Beng'shadelani
programme.desc: Tumelo and his wife are a far cry from the affectionate and happy couple they used to be. After many years together, they can hardly stand being in the same room.

programme.title: Umshado Wethu
programme.desc: A well-off woman finally weds the man of her dreams, but her parents refuse for her to proceed with the wedding because they want her to marry a trust fund baby.

programme.title: Mkhulu
programme.desc: A cheese-girl goes to visit her strict grandfather during school holidays. Their relationship is shaky at first, but here she finally discovers the true meaning of family.

programme.title: Motlholo Wa Ngwedi
programme.desc: Two childhood sweethearts start questioning their union after a tragedy befalls them. Will their relationship crumble under pressure, or will they find their way back to love?

programme.title: Impikiswano
programme.desc: Zolani, an intelligent high school student who believes he's the smartest person in the room, has his life turned upside down when his twin sister, Samu, decides to play matchmaker.

programme.title: Waduma Umilani
programme.desc: Milani and Ayanda own a makeup brand and spend their time offering makeup demos. Their friendship gets tested when they meet Cindy, an ambassador for a famous makeup brand.

programme.title: Incwadi Yokugqibela
programme.desc: A sick father's last wish is to see his son freed from the claws of a manipulative gold-digging woman.

programme.title: Lil Bandz: Umrepha Webeshu
programme.desc: Lil Bandz is back in the motherland, hoping to regain his musical career. With several unsuccessful events, he learns that two patriots are set on derailing his plans.

programme.title: Isehlukaniso
programme.desc: Two villages are separated by a river, which holds the life to both communities. The villages don't see eye to eye, and no one is willing to swallow their pride.

programme.title: Ehostela
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. The community is up in arms and Mndeni and Khethiwe's bliss is interrupted when Mndeni has to save Juba from the trouble he has got himself into.

programme.title: Maoledi
programme.desc: When her one and only son leaves the family nest to make a life in the city, MaMkhize has to confront the troubling truth that she has no identity outside of her son.

programme.title: One Coffin
programme.desc: A funeral parlour owner is in desperate need of heart surgery. He decides to steal and re-use the coffin he buries his clients in to fund the procedure.

programme.title: Imali Yegazi
programme.desc: A group of actors gather together to investigate the murder of their colleagues.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars in this Oscar nominated film based on a true story. A captain and his crew face their fears head on when they're hijacked by Somali pirates.

programme.title: Apache Junction
programme.desc: A thrilling Western film. A notorious gunslinger comes to the aid of a female reporter who has become a target in a lawless town.

programme.title: Endgame
programme.desc: It is a volatile time in South African history in the 1980s. The peaceful end of apartheid lies in the hands of the ANC leader and an Afrikaner philosophy professor.

programme.title: The Journey Ahead
programme.desc: In this road trip movie, a famous Hollywood actress and a young wilderness expert learn that you can never escape your past.

programme.title: The Road To El Dorado
programme.desc: A fun animated adventure for the whole family. Two fun-loving crooks find the mythical city of gold populated by an ancient group of people who start treating them like Gods.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: The beloved cartoon character gets his own comedy. When a documentary filmmaker arrives at Jellystone Park to shoot a project, she quickly crosses paths with the infamous Yogi Bear.

programme.title: Rugrats In Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Chuckie and the whole gang go on an overseas adventure in their full-length movie. Chuckie is on a mission to find a new mom before his dad marries an evil businesswoman.

programme.title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Meatballs
programme.desc: Chaos reigns in this fun-filled family animation. A scientist tries to solve world hunger only to see things go awry as food falls from the sky in abundance.

programme.title: Problem Child
programme.desc: Home Alone fans will love this sleeper hit family comedy. When a couple adopts a young boy, they soon discover he's mischievous and destructive.

programme.title: Marmaduke
programme.desc: A fun animated film based on a classic newspaper comic strip. A legendary dog trainer tries to train an undisciplined dog in a bid to turn him into a World Dog Championship contender.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Ice Cube stars as a man who falls in love, but he must win over the woman's two children. He gets to bond with them on a road trip, but the children are dead set against him.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In this action comedy, Jennifer Aniston and Gerard Butler give a new meaning to the term dysfunctional couple when a bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals find themselves up against a hardened detective when they attempt to pull off one last heist.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Directing genius Martin Scorsese brings out superb performances from his cast in this classic tale of crime and punishment set in the inner-workings of a corrupt casino.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Bad Throw
programme.desc: Under the pretense of a thriving business, a struggling car mechanic spoils his family and lives above his means until his luck changes.

programme.title: The Calling
programme.desc: A couple celebrates six years of marriage, but when the wife is called to become a pastor, the flaws in their marriage come into full view.

programme.title: The Room Divider
programme.desc: A gullible man is about to become the new chancellor of his community. However, he gets into a sticky situation that could jeopardise his marriage and his new job.

programme.title: Rembrandt
programme.desc: A young man dreams of becoming a painter, but the lifestyle of flashy cars and clothes pulls him in a different direction, further away from his passion.

programme.title: Imboni Yama Tekisi
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. We meet the taxi bosses who are trying to preserve their legacies in this dangerous industry: wheelchair-bound Sabelo Ndaba, the Biyela twins and widow Nthabiseng Keroane.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: 'S1/E221 of 260'. Sinesipho gathers her allies to buy the Giants and makes Phil an offer he can't refuse. Oratile inspires Lebo to believe in his recovery, but Lebo misreads her signals.

programme.title: Izingane Zes'thembu
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Abongwe and Mpilo discuss last night's shocking events while Lwandle shares his future plans with his father. MaYeni questions Mpumelelo's readiness for marriage.

programme.title: Mzansi Magic Music Specials
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 of 22'. Mzansi Magic Music Specials returns for season six with Stoan Seate and a new addition, Luthando Shosha, as we take a trip down memory lane with Loyiso Bala.

programme.title: Mzansi Magic Music Specials

programme.title: Lerato Weh
programme.desc: Lerato feels out of place with her new family, but when a house party gets out of hand, she must work with her new siblings to avoid disaster.

programme.title: Outdaughtered
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - When Danielle's Away, The Quints Will Play'. When Danielle leaves town for work, Adam's in charge of all six kids. Plus, a routine eye check-up for Hazel delivers shocking news.

programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Picture Them Naked'. In therapy Emma realises she hides behind the family's personalities. They're due to do a speech, will she speak for herself, or falter in front of a crowd?

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - I Miss My Old Face'. Kamil has lost half of his nose and needs prosthetist Nigel's help. Plus, surgeon Vijay pieces together Dean's shattered jaw and cheekbone.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - I Just Want A New Nose'. After enduring years of torment over her looks, Holly wants a straighter nose. Plus, Leo has become isolated since losing his left eye to cancer.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Hole In The Face'. Alex has become a prisoner in his own home after having his nose surgically removed. Plus, an infected insect bite has left a gaping hole in Tracey's neck.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - McDonough, GA'. The team heads to Georgia to investigate the site of a tragic 1900 train crash. Could the engine have been cursed, or is an unseen force at play in the town?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Beware The Occult'. The team visit a widow's home where there's intense paranormal activity. Are spirits attached to an old bible, or is her late husband to blame for the haunting?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S15/E11 - The Kennedy Wedding Disaster, the Weeping Icon and the Red Herring'. Don Wildman examines an iconic wedding dress, a miraculous painting and an underwater enigma.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: 'S15/E2 - The Sayre Specters'. Samantha Hawes and Dustin Pari join TAPS as they visit a Pennsylvania mansion. The team's investigation unearths a grave secret about this house of tragedies.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Bump Outs And Burls'. Alaskan builder Adam Tschappat's team is cut in half due to volunteer firefighter duties delaying his Family Legacy cabin build in the Wrangell Mountains.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Hello Hoonah'. Builder Adam and his brothers deal with record-breaking spring temperatures. Plus, Dave and Hans nearly get stranded due to receding tides at the Island Getaway build.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S111/E7 - Returning To A Childhood Home'. A couple move their family to Greystones, Ireland. Budget, style and location are all important, she wants a detatched house with a big yard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Castle By The Sea'. Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Far outside his comfort zone, he even taps emperor Caesar for help.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. John's plans are derailed when a tree crushes his shelter. Ben finds the best dig site he's ever seen and Boyce's only shot at gold leaves him with dire options.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Help Us'. Butte's Dumas Brothel is famous for its ghosts, but the hauntings have now turned aggressive. To find answers, Dave, Cindy and K.D. investigate the dark entity.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - I'm Coming For You'. A family is plagued by poltergeist activity and a menacing shadow figure who visits their small son. Is this house connected to the darker side of Butte?

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Bump Outs And Burls'. Alaskan builder Adam Tschappat's team is cut in half due to volunteer firefighter duties delaying his Family Legacy cabin build in the Wrangell Mountains.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Hello Hoonah'. Builder Adam and his brothers deal with record-breaking spring temperatures. Plus, Dave and Hans nearly get stranded due to receding tides at the Island Getaway build.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Stranger'. Neil's project is over budget, so his partner moves to push him out of his oldest business. Jeremy and his boys go on a supply run and return with Jason Lobo.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Thaw & Order'. Plans for tourism at the Motherlode mine push forward. The last days of winter threaten life as they know it and the locals must once again band together.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Fight For Gold'. When fighting the beast within, every man has his threshold. After weeks of tension among the miners, they prepare to depart from Eqi.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Sixty Degrees Of Separation'. After an irreparable disagreement between Eric and Josh, the miners have split into two factions but Josh's team runs into iceberg- sized trouble.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Perilous Bank Barn'. The crew takes down a Pennsylvania bank barn to recover the beams and sleeper logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Homestead Corn Crib'. The guys reclaim a dangerous corn crib and put it back up with an old-fashioned barn raising.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - X Marks The Spot'. Toxic fumes threaten to end the search and the team must improvise a solution. A startling discovery on an aerial drone camera reveals an important location.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Payday'. The team searches the huge tunnel, but with the valley on the verge of flooding, they're forced to risk their lives in a bid to solve the 300-year-old Sacambaya mystery.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Taipei'. Andrew Zimmern travels to the food mecca of Taipei, Taiwan. He learns the secret to turning eggs into hard-as-iron street food and faces stinky tofu in a factory.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Ho Chi Minh City'. Andrew Zimmern heads to Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. He feats on sucking snails, hunts for rice field rats and gets a taste of farm-raised porcupine.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
